case_title: SUZANNE JAMIESON VS. KEVIN KELLERMAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JAMIESON, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLERMAN, KEVIN DEALER EDUCATION SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE TO VENUE, NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLERMAN, KEVIN DEALER EDUCATION SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2008 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CHALLENGE TO VENUE DENIED. CONTINUE FOR TRIAL ON JANUARY 28, 2009. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KELLERMAN, KEVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEALER EDUCATION SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMIESON, SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLERMAN, KEVIN DEALER EDUCATION SERVICES $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,345.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KELLERMAN, KEVIN DEALER EDUCATION SERVICES
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF JAMIESON, SUZANNE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
